---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly.
title: "[bug] "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
---

## What happened

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction

```sh
# Minimal steps to reproduce the issue.
npx codex-toolkit init
codex "..."
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened — paste the error message, stderr, and decision JSON if you have it.

## Environment

- OS (e.g. macOS 15.3, Ubuntu 24.04):
- Node version (`node -v`):
- Codex CLI version (`codex --version`):
- codex-toolkit version (`npx codex-toolkit version`):
- Config file in use (redact secrets): attach or paste below

## Additional context

Anything else worth knowing.
